title: German Chicken Skewers
description: Tender chicken skewers marinated in a classic German-inspired mixture of beer, herbs, and spices, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together beer, olive oil, onion powder, garlic powder, oregano, salt, and pepper to make the marinade.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and toss to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
